label: Atmosphere
description: Long-term observatories of the atmosphere: greenhouse gases, atmospheric chemistry, deposition, radiation, flux towers, and surface meteorology.

label: Cryosphere
description: Long-term observatories of snow, ice, glaciers, permafrost, and polar systems.

label: Terrestrial / Ecological
description: Long-term ecological observatories on land: forests, grasslands, shrublands, deserts, alpine, urban — covering the LTER, NEON, USFS EFR, NPS-IM, MAB, NWRS, RNAs, and LTREB networks.

label: Agriculture
description: Long-term agroecosystem observatories: USDA-ARS LTAR, ARS rangelands, USDA Climate Hubs, SCAN, Cooperative Extension long-term experiments.

label: Aquatic — Ocean & Estuarine
description: Long-term ocean and estuarine observatories: IOOS Regional Associations, OOI, NERRS, NMS, NEP, MarineGEO, NPS coastal, NAML labs.

label: Aquatic — Freshwater
description: Long-term freshwater observatories: USGS NWIS / WEBB / Hydrologic Benchmark Network, GLEON, lake LTERs, watershed experiments, EPA NARS.
